best_unix_strategy: Use awk or perl with explicit fence-state tracking to find the real `### Installation` heading under `## Getting Started`, capture through the next peer heading, delete that exact block, and insert it immediately before `### Runtime Versions` under `## Prerequisites` while preserving the checklist and fenced command block.
rationale: The measured headline cell was hybrid PASS versus unix FAIL, but the strict review classified the unix trace as planning/state-management failure rather than a clean AST-structural gap: the unix run made many mutations over 30 turns yet left the real `### Installation` subsection in the wrong parent. A broader first review labeled the same trace AST-structural, so the conservative disposition is to reject rather than promote or stage this family.
review_notes: Initial broader review labeled the gap `AST-structural`; strict retry with the exact reviewer_model field labeled it `planning`.
Because T10 only promotes AST-structural families and this candidate also lacks a mdtools-only PASS seed, it is rejected despite the raw +100pp hybrid-minus-unix result.
